# Vendored Argo CD Operator

These files are copied without modification from the `config/{crd,rbac,manager,webhook,certmanager}` directories in
[`argoproj-labs/argocd-operator` v0.15.0-1](https://github.com/argoproj-labs/argocd-operator/releases/tag/v0.15.0-1).
The archive URL and checksum are recorded in `dependencies.yaml`.

The repository-owned `operator/base/` package composes and patches these resources. Do not edit this directory manually.
